page.title: Security Audit
page.trustScoreExplain: Trust scores (0–100) reflect {{count}} security checks. 80+ is safe, 60–79 is low risk, below 60 needs review.
page.disclaimer: Automated heuristic checks — not a substitute for professional security review.

loadingState.scanning: Scanning your extensions for security issues.

empty.readyDescription: Scan your extensions for vulnerabilities, dangerous commands, and trust scores.
empty.nothingInstalled: Nothing is installed in this scope yet.

promptInjection.label: Prompt Injection
promptInjection.description: Extension content could manipulate the AI agent's behavior

rce.label: Remote Code Execution
rce.description: Extension could execute arbitrary code on your machine

credentialTheft.label: Credential Theft
credentialTheft.description: Extension may attempt to access stored credentials

plaintextSecrets.label: Plaintext Secrets
plaintextSecrets.description: API keys or tokens found in plain text

safetyBypass.label: Safety Bypass
safetyBypass.description: Extension attempts to disable agent safety features

dangerousCommands.label: Dangerous Commands
dangerousCommands.description: Extension uses potentially harmful shell commands

broadPermissions.label: Broad Permissions
broadPermissions.description: Extension requests more access than it needs

permissionComboRisk.label: Permission Combination Risk
permissionComboRisk.description: Dangerous combination of permissions that could enable data exfiltration or RCE

cliCredentialStorage.label: CLI Credential Storage
cliCredentialStorage.description: CLI credential file has overly permissive permissions or unknown storage location

cliNetworkAccess.label: CLI Network Access
cliNetworkAccess.description: CLI connects to many external API domains

cliBinarySource.label: CLI Binary Source
cliBinarySource.description: CLI binary was installed via untrusted method or has unknown origin

cliPermissionScope.label: CLI Permission Scope
cliPermissionScope.description: CLI child skills span many permission types

cliAggregateRisk.label: CLI Aggregate Risk
cliAggregateRisk.description: CLI child skills combine network, filesystem, and shell permissions

mcpCommandInjection.label: MCP Command Injection
mcpCommandInjection.description: MCP server args contain shell operators or injection patterns

pluginSourceTrust.label: Plugin Source Trust
pluginSourceTrust.description: Plugin has no standard manifest file or no tracked Git origin

pluginLifecycleScripts.label: Plugin Lifecycle Scripts
pluginLifecycleScripts.description: Plugin contains lifecycle scripts (preinstall, postinstall) that run automatically
